info.title: Gatekeeper
info.description: API gateway on Cloudflare Workers with AWS IAM-style policy authorization. Fronts Cloudflare's cache purge API and S3-compatible R2 storage with per-key/credential policies, token-bucket rate limiting, request collapsing, and D1-backed analytics.

tags.name: Purge
tags.description: Cloudflare cache purge via gateway keys

tags.name: DNS
tags.description: Cloudflare DNS record management via gateway keys

tags.name: Keys
tags.description: CRUD for API keys with IAM policies

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Analytics events and summaries (purge, DNS, S3)

tags.name: S3Credentials
tags.description: CRUD for S3-compatible credentials with IAM policies

tags.name: S3Proxy
tags.description: S3-compatible proxy to Cloudflare R2 storage

tags.name: UpstreamTokens
tags.description: Manage upstream Cloudflare API tokens for purge and DNS

tags.name: UpstreamR2
tags.description: Manage upstream R2 endpoints for S3 proxy

post.description: Proxies to the Cloudflare cache purge API with IAM policy authorization, token-bucket rate limiting, and request collapsing. The request body must contain exactly one purge type.

502.description: No upstream API token registered for zone

post.description: Proxies to the Cloudflare DNS Records API with IAM policy authorization. Policies can scope by dns.name, dns.type, dns.content, and other condition fields.

type.description: DNS record type (A, AAAA, CNAME, TXT, MX, etc.)

ttl.description: TTL in seconds, or 1 for auto

502.description: No upstream API token registered for zone

get.description: Lists DNS records for a zone. Supports filtering by type, name, content, etc. All query parameters are passed through to the Cloudflare API.

502.description: No upstream API token registered for zone

get.summary: Export DNS records as BIND zone file
get.description: Exports all DNS records for the zone in BIND format. Requires the dns:export action.

502.description: No upstream API token registered for zone

post.description: Batch operations on DNS records. Execution order: deletes -> patches -> puts -> posts. Each sub-operation is individually authorized against the IAM policy. If any sub-operation is denied, the entire batch is rejected.

403.description: Policy denied (one or more sub-operations rejected)

502.description: No upstream API token registered for zone

post.summary: Import DNS records from BIND zone file
post.description: Imports DNS records from a BIND zone file. This is a powerful bulk mutation that bypasses per-record authorization. Requires the dns:import action. Rate limited to 3 requests/minute by Cloudflare.

502.description: No upstream API token registered for zone
No upstream API token registered for zone

patch.description: PATCH update — only the provided fields are changed.

502.description: No upstream API token registered for zone

put.description: PUT update — all fields are replaced.

502.description: No upstream API token registered for zone

delete.description: Deletes a DNS record by ID. A pre-flight GET is performed to resolve the record's FQDN and type for policy evaluation against dns.name/dns.type conditions.

502.description: No upstream API token registered for zone

post.description: Creates a new API key with an attached IAM policy document.

delete.summary: Revoke or permanently delete a key
delete.description: Soft-revokes by default. Pass `permanent=true` to hard-delete.

post.description: Revoke multiple keys in one request. Supports dry_run preview.
Permanently delete multiple keys. Supports dry_run preview.
Creates a new S3-compatible credential with an IAM policy. Returns the secret_access_key only once.

delete.summary: Revoke or permanently delete an S3 credential

post.summary: Register an upstream Cloudflare API token
post.description: Registers a Cloudflare API token for proxying purge requests. Optionally validates the token against the Cloudflare API when `validate: true`.
Registers an R2 endpoint with credentials for S3 proxy forwarding. Optionally validates connectivity when `validate: true`.

get.summary: Get a specific upstream R2 endpoint

get.description: Returns resolved config values, admin overrides, and hardcoded defaults.

put.description: Sets one or more config overrides. Values must be positive finite numbers.

delete.summary: Reset a config key to default
delete.description: Removes an admin override, reverting the key to its env/default value.

get.description: Handles GetObject, ListObjectsV2, ListBuckets, and other S3 GET operations. Authenticates via AWS Sig V4, evaluates IAM policies, then proxies to R2.

403.description: Access denied by IAM policy (S3 XML error)

404.description: Object or bucket not found (S3 XML error)

put.description: Handles PutObject, CopyObject, CreateBucket, and other S3 PUT operations.

post.description: Handles DeleteObjects (batch), CompleteMultipartUpload, and other S3 POST operations.

delete.description: Handles DeleteObject, DeleteBucket, AbortMultipartUpload, and other S3 DELETE operations.

BulkDryRunResult.description: Preview of a dry-run bulk operation

S3Event.description: A single S3 proxy analytics event

DnsEvent.description: A single DNS proxy analytics event

token_preview.description: First 4 + last 4 chars of the token

UpstreamToken.description: A registered upstream Cloudflare API token

ConfigResponse.description: Full config response with overrides and defaults

ApiKeyAuth.description: Gateway API key (prefix `gw_`). Issued via POST /admin/keys.

AdminKeyAuth.name: X-Admin-Key
AdminKeyAuth.description: Shared admin secret for CLI and automation.

CloudflareAccess.name: Cf-Access-Jwt-Assertion
CloudflareAccess.description: Cloudflare Access JWT for browser-based dashboard users.

S3SigV4Auth.name: Authorization
S3SigV4Auth.description: AWS Signature Version 4 authentication for S3-compatible clients.
